title: ジャパンCの後に・挑戦

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
And they've crossed the finish line! In first place,
it's...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
I didn't think you had it in you! That was a great
run, Dia.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Thank you!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
You too, Kita. You've gotten much better than I
had imagined!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
You mean it?! But I still plan on taking my running
to even greater heights in the Arima Kinen!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I'm not at all satisfied with my performance yet
either.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I've always been chasing after the two of you, and
McQueen as well, but now I feel like we're finally
on the same starting line.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Good for you. Both of you.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
I can see your desire to defeat us glowing in those
eyes. I like it.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
You kinda remind me of myself when I was
younger.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: I do?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. I really looked up to Prez back then... I
competed in the Twinkle Series in the hopes of
one day surpassing her.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
And then, when it came time to challenge her
directly...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
She went from my idol to my rival. I wanted to
defeat her at any cost.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
I kinda got the vibe that you two might be feeling
the same way I did back then!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
But you better realize that I haven't lost my
appetite for a challenge.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Seeing the way you two run has me fired up to
show you my full strength!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
I'm ready to throw down the gauntlet in the Arima
Kinen!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: You better be ready for me!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: I will be!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: I'll do my best!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
(I've seen two ways illustrious racers conduct
themselves...)

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
(McQueen valiantly accepts challenges from
others, while Teio embodies the role of a fierce
challenger.)

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: (So what about me?)

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
(I won a G1 race for the Satono family... I
overcame the jinx and seized victory.)

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
(I chased after Kita and raced against her in the
Twinkle Series.)

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: (I've got it!)

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: ...Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After a long silence, Satono Diamond begins to
speak with a determined look on her face.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: I'd like to continue taking on new challenges.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Yes. I've challenged myself with various goals
time and again to get this far. Breaking the jinx
holding back the Satono family... Chasing after
Kita...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
That's why I think being the kind of illustrious
runner who takes on all kinds of challenges is the
best path for me to take.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Challenging McQueen and Teio was my first step
towards that path—the first new page of my
contribution to the annals of the Satono family.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
By facing all kinds of challenges, I want to carve
out a place for myself in the history of both the
Satono family and the world of Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Which brings me to say—my desire to compete
overseas has been rekindled.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I'm not doing it to prove it's possible. It's simply
what I want to do.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I want to win an overseas race and etch the
Satono family name into Umamusume history.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
By doing so, I hope to break new ground for both
my family and for all the Umamusume racing in
Japan.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: I think that is how I can contribute to the world of Umamusume.
choice_data_list: It looks like you've found your answer.
It looks like you've found your answer.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: I have!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
This is the kind of illustrious racer that I wish to
be. I know what I need to strive for now.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
First up—I'm going to win the Arima Kinen and
join the ranks of the most illustrious racers!
